name: headless-demo
description: Headless surface demo: framework-only base + the Headless_* content surface (own itemtypes + repositories - self-contained, ZERO Swift design package / surface-swift dependency, proven by the Swift 2.4 base split) + sample data. The headless A1-A9 probes are contributed by the surface layer's own assert set (gate -Edition dispatch to gate-headless). Proven on DW 10.28.1-PreRelease.
